pass1_value.note: Docs and FAQ explain developers can create integrations and obtain internal integration tokens via 'My integrations' and state the API is available to all Notion users (no paid plan required).

final_value.note: Official docs show developers can self-serve credentials by creating an integration from Notion settings and then copying the Internal Integration Token to authenticate API requests.

pass1_value.note: Developer can self-register an integration (My integrations) and obtain an internal integration token or implement the OAuth 2.0 flow; official REST docs and SDKs are available.
